markers.evidence_type: encodes CD161, innate lymphocyte marker, scRNA-seq

other_findings.finding: ILC1/NK cells have overlapping features of ILC1 and NK cells, reflecting the biological continuum between group 1 ILCs
This is a hybrid/transitional population — not purely ILC1 or NK, but sharing markers of both

evidence_quotes.quote: ILC1/NK have overlapping features of ILC1 and NKs, as described
